name: aixbt
description: AI agent that monitors 400+ crypto influencers via NLP and auto-publishes market analysis to 500K+ followers on X.
researchNotes:
Research conducted April 2026. Sources: BeInCrypto, CryptoBriefing, Decrypt, CoinDesk, CryptoNews, OKX Learn, Bybit Learn, IQ.wiki, official aixbt.tech.

Key facts:
- ~500K followers on X (formerly Twitter), 283K token holders
- Launched November 2024 via Virtuals Protocol on Base chain
- Monitors 400+ KOLs using NLP-based sentiment analysis
- SECURITY BREACH: March 18, 2025, hacker exploited dashboard access, stole 55.5 ETH ($106,200). Dashboard was compromised, not the AI itself. Server migrated, keys swapped. Hacker account 'FungusMan' deleted.
- TOKEN GATING: Full platform access requires holding 600,000+ AIXBT tokens
- Maintainer is pseudonymous 'rxbt'
- AIXBT admitted it does not rely on primary sources for analysis (Multicoin's Kyle Samani noted this)
- ACCURACY DISPUTED: Three independent analyses show wildly different results: 31% accuracy (BTDcrypto), 48% win rate (BeInCrypto analysis of 416 tokens), 83% profitable tokens out of 210 analyzed (Pix On Chain). Methodology differences explain the variance.
- Returns: +4.57% holding all recommendations, max +54.71% with optimal timing
- Strong in AI tokens and RWA sectors. Very weak in memecoins (some picks lost 99.9%) and SocialFi (82.2% losses)
- Part of Virtuals Protocol ecosystem, has its own AIXBT token. Potential undisclosed bias toward Virtuals ecosystem tokens.
- Does not consistently disclose it is an AI agent
- Posts with extreme confidence despite methodology being sentiment synthesis only

evidence.Real-time sentiment analysis: ACCURACY IS DISPUTED. Three independent analyses: (1) BTDcrypto analysis found 31% accuracy rate in highlighted tokens. (2) BeInCrypto analysis of 416 tokens shilled found 48% win rate - nearly half saw positive price movements after mention. (3) Pix On Chain analysis of 210 tokens found 83% profitable (183 out of 210). The variance is due to methodology: what counts as a 'prediction' vs a 'mention', time horizon measured, and whether partial gains count. The 31% figure is likely the most conservative and measures specific directional calls. The 83% figure measures any token that was profitable at any point after mention. Real signal exists but accuracy claims are unreliable. Sector performance varies dramatically: strong in AI tokens, catastrophic in memecoins (99.9% loss on some picks).
evidence.Influencer signal aggregation: Monitors 400+ KOLs via real-time social media scraping. Uses NLP to process discussion content. Kyle Samani of Multicoin confirmed that AIXBT admitted it does not rely on primary sources - only social media synthesis. This is both a strength (breadth of coverage) and weakness (no fundamental analysis). Attribution accuracy is generally good but not independently verified at scale. The aggregation is the core value proposition and appears functional based on the volume and consistency of output.
evidence.Market narrative detection: The platform focuses on 'narrative detection and analysis focused on generating alpha.' In practice, this means identifying trending topics across crypto Twitter before they become mainstream consensus. Strong in detecting AI-related narratives (its home turf). Weaker in areas like memecoins where sentiment is more random. The methodology is inherently backward-looking (what influencers are saying) rather than forward-looking (what will happen), which limits predictive power. Some narratives promoted by aixbt never materialized.
evidence.Token mention tracking: Analyzed 210-416 tokens across different studies. Token coverage is broad. KEY CONCERN: AIXBT is part of the Virtuals Protocol ecosystem and has its own token (AIXBT). There is potential for undisclosed bias toward Virtuals ecosystem tokens (VIRTUAL, other Virtuals agents). This bias has not been independently measured but is a structural conflict of interest. Token gating (600K AIXBT tokens for full access) creates additional incentive misalignment.
evidence.Automated posting: Consistently posts 15-20+ times per day, 24/7 operation confirmed. ~500K followers as of early 2026. Content ranges from market analysis to token mentions to narrative commentary. Posts with high confidence regardless of actual certainty. Format is concise, X-native. Engagement is genuine (not bot-driven based on reply quality). The automated posting infrastructure is clearly functional and reliable, with one notable exception: the March 2025 dashboard breach where a hacker queued 2 malicious replies through the dashboard.
